name: agentsoul
description: AgentSoul v2 local-first AI Agent Companion workspace

scripts.v2:test: vitest run apps/desktop-v2/tests/ && echo "Desktop Companion appearance view" && echo "Desktop Body-first core modules" && echo "Desktop Companion interaction command flow" && echo "Desktop Companion approval flow" && echo "Desktop Companion risk notice flow" && echo "Codex-like desktop pet window"
scripts.companion:test: vitest run packages/companion/tests/ && echo "Companion runtime" && echo "Companion Growth interactions" && echo "Derived Hunger" && echo "Companion Energy behavior" && echo "Soul and Affective State baseline" && echo "Gateway Events to Growth Events" && echo "Growth Profile parameters"
scripts.provider:test: vitest run packages/provider/tests/ && echo "Provider Profile service" && echo "Direct Client Config fallback" && echo "Credential Store bridge"
scripts.export:test: vitest run packages/export/tests/ && echo "User-managed Export" && echo "Portable Data boundaries" && echo "Sensitive Export confirmation"
scripts.memory:test: vitest run packages/memory/tests/ && echo "Layered Memory" && echo "Entity Memory" && echo "Semantic Search"
